raw: Each coupon admits up to four people for 50% off regular admission per person at the New England Aquarium. This discount applies to full-price adult and child admission rates. Children under the age of 3 are always admitted free. Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium's website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience. ID: 25277 PLEASE BE AWARE: · This is not a ticket. · Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people. · Valid only for Aquarium admission, and only on the date printed on the coupon. · This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. · Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold. · Void if altered or copied. No cash value. · Hours of operation are subject to change. This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].age_range: Children under the age of 3 are always admitted free
